frontmatter.title: gh-contrib
frontmatter.description: An open-source fix I made to a GitHub CLI extension that renders your contribution graph in the terminal, so it shows the correct data over a proper sliding one-year window.
frontmatter.keywords: gh-contrib,github cli,contribution graph,terminal,open source,bug fix,sliding window,shell
frontmatter.bannercaption: Your contribution graph, correctly, right in the terminal
